posts.angle: better ad tooling still needs cleaner billing and payment control
posts.hook: Ad platforms keep adding smarter tools.
posts.copy:
Ad platforms keep adding smarter tools.

Gemini is stopping harmful ads before people ever see them Teams move faster when payment setup does not slow subscriptions, ads, or cross-border checkout.

RichXPay supports use case page for funding a virtual card with usdt or usdc for subscriptions, ads and overseas spending.
sourceTitles: Gemini is stopping harmful ads before people ever see them
We’re upgrading Dynamic Search Ads to AI Max
posts.landingSummary: Use case page for funding a virtual card with USDT or USDC for subscriptions, ads and overseas spending.
